title: Training Composer 2
summary: Sasha Rush presents Cursor's training pipeline for Composer 2, covering base model selection using Kimi K2.5, coding-focused continued pre-training, long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install bootstrapping, reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization for extended context handling.
